summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new OLAP Assistant features. All new functionality working correctly: Filter Builder dialog with Add Filter functionality, Excel export capability, and proper metric card icon alignment. All existing OLAP functionality remains intact.
passed_tests: Filter Builder dialog opens when clicking the button
Add Filter button successfully adds filter rows in dialog
Multiple filter rows can be added (tested with 2 filters)
Filter Builder button shows correct badge count (2) when filters are added
Export dropdown appears when results are displayed
Export dropdown shows both CSV and Excel options
Export as CSV functionality works (triggers download)
Export as Excel functionality works (triggers download)
Icons in metric cards are properly centered in top-right corner
All existing OLAP query functionality still works
Natural language query processing works: 'Show top 5 products by revenue'
LLM integration provides detailed OLAP analysis explanations
Chart/Table tabs are functional and switch correctly
Chart Type dropdown contains all options (Bar, Pie, Line, Area)
Chart type switching works correctly (tested Pie chart)
OLAP operation badges display correctly (AGGREGATE)
Results display with proper dimensions and data visualization
Bookmark/Save functionality is available
Available Dimensions section displays correctly
Summary metric cards show correct data and icon alignment
Query Assistant panel functions properly
Dark/Light mode toggle remains functional

success_percentage.new_features: 100% (Filter Builder, Excel export, icon alignment all working)
